title: Mark Cuban endorses Incorruptible
summary: Investor and entrepreneur Mark Cuban calls Incorruptible a playbook for founders to avoid inevitable pitfalls.
blockquote: Every founder hopes their path is a straight line. It won't be. They hope they will have the right mentor to help them avoid problems. They won't. Eric Ries gives founders a playbook to help avoid the inevitable pitfalls and find your path to the business you set out to create.
